property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\7-Zip;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\WINDOWS\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Muse Hub\lib;D:\programs\git\Git\cmd;D:\programs\nodeJS\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\180\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;D:\programs\Fiddler;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Muse Hub\lib;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Roaming\npm;D:\programs\java_IDE\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.3\bin;C:\Users\PC\.dotnet\tools;.

testcase.name: testHqlQueries
testcase.system-out: === ╨в╨╡╤Б╤В╤Г╨▓╨░╨╜╨╜╤П HQL ╨Ч╨░╨┐╨╕╤В╤Ц╨▓ === Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.detail_id, c1_0.fullName, c1_0.phoneNumber, c1_0.tariff_id from clients c1_0 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? HQL ╨╖╨╜╨░╨╣╤И╨╛╨▓ ╨║╨╗╤Ц╤Ф╨╜╤В╤Ц╨▓: 8 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.detail_id, c1_0.fullName, c1_0.phoneNumber, c1_0.tariff_id from clients c1_0 join tariffs t1_0 on t1_0.id=c1_0.tariff_id where t1_0.name=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? HQL ╨║╨╗╤Ц╤Ф╨╜╤В╨╕ ╨╜╨░ 'SuperNet Unlim': Yevhen Gozhenko

testcase.name: testSqlQueries
testcase.system-out: === ╨в╨╡╤Б╤В╤Г╨▓╨░╨╜╨╜╤П Native SQL ╨Ч╨░╨┐╨╕╤В╤Ц╨▓ === Hibernate: SELECT * FROM clients Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? SQL ╨╖╨╜╨░╨╣╤И╨╛╨▓ ╨║╨╗╤Ц╤Ф╨╜╤В╤Ц╨▓: 8 Hibernate: SELECT c.* FROM clients c JOIN tariffs t ON c.tariff_id = t.id WHERE t.name = ? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.passportNumber from client_details c1_0 where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.monthlyFee, t1_0.name from tariffs t1_0 where t1_0.id=?
